facebook.caption: POV: you're wandering Ong Lang with no plan and stumble onto Tim Coffee. 4.7 stars. 389 reviews. Somehow still quiet. This is the kind of café that makes you cancel your afternoon. Ong Lang is already the low-key side of Phu Quoc, and Tim Coffee sits right in the middle of that energy. Order something, slow down, stay longer than you planned. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Tim Coffee in Ong Lang. 4.7 stars, 389 reviews, and barely anyone inside. Watch what happens when you stop rushing and just sit. This is the Phu Quoc most tourists never find.

instagram.caption: POV: wrong turn in Ong Lang. Found Tim Coffee. 4.7★, 389 reviews, and almost empty. Don't walk past this one. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Stumbled into Tim Coffee in Ong Lang. 4.7 stars. Quiet. Worth every minute.
